title: Start Kit
description: This mod created only for servers, adds a start kit to survival mode on servers. A start kit adds a stone tools, iron armor, 30 breads and 30 apples
body:
This mod created only for servers, adds a start kit to survival mode on servers. A start kit adds a stone tools, iron armor, 30 breads and 30 apples

I'm hope this mod will be useful on your server
